'''Twin''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] and the girlfriend of [[Skeel (Cerean)|Skeel]]. After the death of Skeel, Twin went directly to [[Maj-Odo-Nomor]], who fell for Twin's charms.

==Biography==
In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], Twin supported a movement by [[Bron (Human)|Bron]] and stood up for the development of advanced technologies on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]]. She and her friend Skeel joined the Techrats and went on a dangerous race they fought out within the Outsider Citadel.

After Skeel crashed and died in the swoop race, Twin sought affection from Maj. Twin and her close friend [[Sylvn (Cerean)|Sylvn]] were once captured by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], and suffered the humiliation and disgust of serving as his [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] girls. She and Sylvn were later rescued by Sylvn's father, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], during a lightning storm, in which the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] tried to execute them.
